opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: I hid $800 of pet-hair damage for $47 — couch looks brand new
opportunities.before_state: Fabric sofa covered in embedded dog/cat hair, visible stains, worn armrests guests notice immediately
opportunities.after_state: Smooth, tailored cover in neutral tone — couch looks like a new showroom piece, pet hair gone
buyer_intent_keywords: sofa cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season peaks in April–May, flooding pet-owner feeds with exactly this problem at exactly the moment they want to fix it before Memorial Day guests arrive.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor conversation set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned a dead concrete patio into an outdoor living room for $189
opportunities.before_state: Bare or cluttered patio with mismatched plastic chairs, no cohesion, unused outdoor space
opportunities.after_state: Coordinated seating set with cushions, styled with pillows — looks like a $1,000 designer patio
opportunities.why_now: Late April is the single highest-intent week of the year for patio purchases — Memorial Day weekend is 4 weeks out and buyers are actively pulling the trigger.

opportunities.specific_product: Bamboo under-sink cabinet organizer with pull-out drawers
opportunities.transformation_hook: Spring-cleaned my chaotic bathroom cabinet in 10 minutes for $32
opportunities.before_state: Under-sink cabinet stuffed with fallen bottles, plastic bags, cleaning sprays piled on each other, complete chaos every time the door opens
opportunities.after_state: Two-tier pull-out drawers, every product upright and visible, cabinet looks intentionally designed
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning content is at annual peak engagement in late April — bathroom organization Reels are outperforming kitchen content this week as audiences pivot to smaller, faster wins.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm adjustable side sleeper pillow with cutout
opportunities.transformation_hook: Woke up without neck pain for the first time in 2 years — $89 pillow did it
opportunities.before_state: Waking up with stiff neck and shoulder pain, stacking regular pillows that flatten overnight, groggy mornings
opportunities.after_state: Shoulder cutout keeps spine neutral all night — waking up genuinely rested with zero neck tension
buyer_intent_keywords: best pillow for side sleepers neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content sustains year-round virality but spikes in spring as viewers reset habits — neck pain angle drives unusually high comment-to-view ratios that trigger algorithmic boost.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia magnetic knife strip + utensil crock bundle
opportunities.transformation_hook: Cleared my entire cluttered counter for $38 — kitchen looks twice as big
opportunities.before_state: Countertop crowded with a stuffed knife block, overflowing utensil crock, random tools taking up 30% of usable prep space
opportunities.after_state: Wall-mounted magnetic strip holds all knives, slim crock holds spatulas — counters visually open, kitchen feels upgraded
buyer_intent_keywords: kitchen tools that save counter space
opportunities.why_now: Spring kitchen declutter content is surging and the counter-clearing hook plays perfectly into the 'my kitchen looks bigger' format that is consistently outperforming standard product reviews this month.
